name: Environment proposal

## Environment Idea

Describe the environment and why it belongs in this repo.

## Claim Boundary

What should this environment test, and what should it not claim yet?

## Relationship To Existing Work

Does this extend Counterpoint, PlateSupport, or another `state_collapser`
example?

## Evaluation Path

Which calibration/smoke stages should this environment pass first?
